subject: deals to be extended on meter 985097 - 12/00

emails.subject: Deals to be Extended on Meter 985097 - 12/00
emails.subject_base: Deals to be Extended on Meter 985097 - 12/00
emails.body: Deals to be Extended on Meter 985097 12/00 According to the meter statement, there was overflow from November on meter 985097 and the following deals need to be extended for 12/1 only. 118532 101473 138017 Thanks and if you need further information, please let me know. Karen
